title: viola langsdorffii
intro: Viola langsdorffii, also known as the Langsdorf's violet or Chinese dog violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Viola langsdorffii is often used in teas, infusions, and tonics, and is also dried and used as a powder or capsule for its medicinal properties.
